app.name: Jesta Azure DevOps Sidebar
app.short_description: Private Zendesk sidebar app for Azure DevOps create and link workflows.
app.long_description: A private Zendesk sidebar app for Jesta I.S. agents to create new Azure DevOps work items, link existing ones, and view the current engineering handoff state without leaving Zendesk.
app.installation_instructions: Install as a private Zendesk Support app. During pilot, the app is intended to be visible only on the Musa ADO Form Testing ticket form.

ticket_sidebar.title: Azure DevOps
ticket_sidebar.scaffold_body: This sidebar reads the live ticket context, stays gated to the pilot form, and uses the backend to create or link Azure DevOps work items.
ticket_sidebar.linked_empty_body: Use the sidebar actions to create a new engineering ticket or link an existing work item.
ticket_sidebar.note_placeholder: Share a support update, customer impact, reproduction detail, or escalation context.
ticket_sidebar.actions_hint: Creates or links the work item through the integration backend.
ticket_sidebar.error_title: Could not load the Azure DevOps sidebar state.
ticket_sidebar.not_pilot_form: This app is only enabled on the pilot form during development.
